2026-03-13PCHNational Film ActAppointment of a part-time member of the National Film BoardAppointment of Muriel Laurie Cameron of Halifax, Nova Scotia, to be a part-time member of the National Film Board, to hold office for a term of three years.N/A
subject: Appointment of a part-time member of the National Film Board
precis: Appointment of Muriel Laurie Cameron of Halifax, Nova Scotia, to be a part-time member of the National Film Board, to hold office for a term of three years.
